recent_calls.summary: Nina called to report that her brand new air conditioner is still not cooling despite two service visits and needs immediate attention. She requested a supervisor to be sent out and provided her callback number. The agent documented the issue and informed Nina that the team will call her back on the next business day since it was after-hours.

Alan called to schedule a plumbing service appointment for a valve issue on top of his water heater. The agent confirmed the details and scheduled the appointment for Tuesday morning, March 31st, at 8:00 AM. Alan declined to provide feedback and the call ended amicably.

Tracey called to report a busted pipe at her address requiring immediate attention. The agent documented the issue and informed her that the team would call back first thing the next business day since it was after-hours. Tracey requested a callback and had no further questions.

Tracey called to report water pouring into her kitchen and urgently requested to speak with an agent. The after-hours assistant, Evie, informed her that a live agent was not available but documented the issue as urgent and assured a callback on the next business day. Tracey confirmed her contact details and expressed the need for a callback, which was arranged.

Michayla called to report an emergency sewage backup at 4419 McMasters Avenue, Hannibal, Missouri. The agent confirmed the details and assured that the after-hours team will review the request and call her as soon as possible on the next business day. The emergency notification workflow was initiated during the call.

The user reported a gas leak and a valve issue on the hot water heater that required replacement. The gas company shut off the gas, and the agent confirmed the situation and flagged it as urgent for follow-up on the next business day. The user was informed that no immediate service could be provided after hours and decided to find someone else for immediate help.

The user, Marc, requested that Nicole call his office during regular business hours to schedule a home warranty preventive maintenance visit for his HVAC system. The agent confirmed the details, including the service address and contact number, and noted the request. The user declined to provide additional information or concerns, and the agent mentioned maintenance programs but did not receive a definitive response.

The user called to report an emergency water leak in the sink at their residence in Walden Spring, Missouri. The agent confirmed the details, including the address, contact information, and emergency status, and assured the user that the team would reach out the next business day. The user preferred to be contacted by phone for follow-up.

Shoshana Israel called to follow up on an AC service appointment arranged through American Home Shield. The agent confirmed her details, corrected the dispatch number, and submitted the service request for cooling system repair. Shoshana rated the AI assistant positively and provided feedback that it was easy to talk to.

Susan called to schedule a heating service appointment because her fan runs but doesn't blow heat. The agent confirmed the details and noted Susan's flexible availability for the appointment. Susan provided feedback, rating the AI assistant a 4 and expressing a preference for speaking with a real person.

The user called to request water heater service at their home in Saint Peters, Missouri. The agent collected the user's details, confirmed the service address, and noted the user's flexible availability for a service appointment. The user requested a callback to discuss service call pricing and confirm the appointment.

April from American Home Shield called to provide a dispatch number for a gas furnace replacement and confirmed that the customer will accept out-of-pocket costs. The agent confirmed the service address and email, and noted the request to have the customer called in the morning for further assistance and details. The user requested that all necessary details for the modification and upgrade be included when the team contacts the customer.

Stephanie called to schedule a routine HVAC maintenance service for the summer. She provided her availability as Monday through Friday, 8 AM to 5 PM, and confirmed her contact details and service address. The agent noted all details and confirmed the callback number, completing the scheduling process.

The user reported that their air conditioner is not working after a recent service visit, with no air blowing and water dripping from the water tank. The agent collected the user's details and assured that the team would be notified to address the issue. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further questions.
The user called and requested to speak to a South salesperson. The agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The call ended with a successful transfer.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to report an issue with their heating and cooling system where the outside unit fan was not working. The agent successfully booked a service appointment for Tuesday, April 1st at 4:00 PM and confirmed the user's details and service address. The user provided positive feedback about the call experience.

The user called to speak with Dan but was informed by the agent Sophie that Dan was unavailable. Sophie offered to assist or pass along a message, but the user did not provide further information or request a callback before ending the call.
The user called Budget and requested to speak to a real person instead of the AI assistant. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The user called back after receiving a missed call and requested to speak with someone. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent and successfully transferred the call.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to another agent successfully. The call lasted 20 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user, Gina Mccloud, called to confirm that the technician scheduled for today could park in the driveway on the Tennessee side. The agent confirmed the service details for the air conditioning unit, which is not blowing cold air, and reassured the user that the technician is already scheduled for today. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further action needed.

The user called to schedule routine heating and air conditioning maintenance appointments for spring and fall. The agent confirmed the user's ownership and service needs, then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The call was very brief, with the agent attempting to start the conversation by asking for the service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.
The user called after missing a previous call and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 16 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to confirm the cancellation of an air conditioning appointment originally scheduled for August 20, 2026, at 4527 Newberry Terrace, St Louis, Missouri. The agent confirmed the details, including the user's role as "other," and assured that the cancellation would be processed immediately. The user declined additional information about maintenance programs and ended the call after confirming the cancellation.

The user, Jane Skouby, a property manager, called to request an AC estimate and booked a service appointment for April 1st at 12:00 p.m. The agent confirmed the details and informed about a standard dispatch fee. The call ended with the user requesting to speak to a live agent, and the call was transferred successfully.

Courtney called to set up a home warranty service visit for an HVAC issue involving leaking coolant and temperature maintenance problems. The agent collected the necessary details and informed Courtney that the appropriate team would follow up shortly. Courtney declined additional information about maintenance programs and provided brief feedback before ending the call.

Emmanuel Hayes called to cancel a cooling appointment scheduled for April 8th at 4527 Newberry Terrace, Saint Lucie, as the work has already been completed. The agent confirmed the cancellation details and noted that Emmanuel did not want information about maintenance programs. The call ended positively with Emmanuel providing a five-star rating and positive feedback about past experiences.
The call was very brief with the agent greeting the user and the user responding with a short acknowledgment. No further conversation or assistance took place before the user hung up.

The user called to inquire about the status of a repair appointment scheduled for 10 o'clock. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live representative but the call ended abruptly before resolution.

Keith Robinson called to inquire about the status of his AC furnace appointment scheduled for 10 AM. The agent confirmed his details and found the appointment with technician Vernon scheduled from 10 AM to 11 AM local time. The call ended after confirming the appointment information.
The call was very brief with the agent greeting the user twice and the user responding once. No further conversation or assistance took place before the user hung up.
The user mistakenly called the agent, thinking it was a different company, and ended the call quickly after realizing the error.

Charlene called to inquire about a serviceman appointment at her house. The agent confirmed her phone number but could not find any appointment scheduled. Charlene requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the call was successfully transferred.
The user called Budget and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer promptly.

The user called to get in touch with Amy regarding a payment for a quote. The agent informed the user that they do not have direct access to billing information and transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.

The user, Sally Klein, called to request an emergency hot water heater assessment due to the unit beeping at a specific address. The agent provisionally booked an appointment for the next day between 2:00 and 4:00 p.m., but the user insisted on same-day service. The call ended with the agent transferring the call to a live agent for urgent assistance.
The agent greeted the user and attempted to connect her with a live representative. The call was successfully transferred to another agent for further assistance.

The user inquired about the approximate cost of a Lennox HVAC system installation for their 1,348 square foot home. The agent provided a ballpark figure of $2,200 for basic labor plus equipment costs and offered to have a specialist contact the user for more details. The user decided to hold off on getting a detailed estimate at this time.
The user returned a call to Budget regarding a service request. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to schedule a routine spring air conditioning tune-up and successfully booked an appointment for April 13th at 8:00 AM. The agent confirmed the details and informed the user about the dispatch fee. The user then requested to speak to customer support, and the call was transferred accordingly.
The user called to make an appointment for a service unrelated to a home warranty. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help.
The user called back after missing previous calls and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent facilitated the transfer without any issues.

The user called to inquire about the return visit of a technician for repairs. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a human agent who could provide live updates. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another agent who could assist further.
